escalation.rationale: Iranian cluster munition attacks on Israeli cities killed two civilians while Israel struck critical Iranian energy infrastructure including Bushehr nuclear plant grounds.

ticker_items: Projectile hits Iran's Bushehr nuclear plant complex, no radiation leak
Iran strikes Tel Aviv with cluster warheads, 2 killed in Ramat Gan
Israel targets South Pars gas field, 12M cubic meters daily output affected
Trump seeks NATO help securing Hormuz Strait, allies refuse participation

middle_east.description: Projectile struck grounds of Bushehr nuclear power plant complex with no radiation release reported
Strike on Phase 14 processing facilities caused fire affecting 12 million cubic meters daily gas output
Cluster munition missile barrage targeted central Israel in retaliation for killing of Iranian officials
Bunker buster bombs targeted Iranian coastal positions near Strait of Hormuz

middle_east.text: US had $10 million prize on Larijani's head, we did it for free
middle_east.speaker: Gideon Sa'ar
middle_east.title: Israeli Minister

middle_east.text: Gulf oil facilities are legitimate targets following attacks on large gasfield
middle_east.speaker: Iranian officials
middle_east.title: Government statement

middle_east.text: The US could end the war with the Islamic Republic in the near future
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Prime Minister Takaichi visits White House Thursday facing pressure from Trump for support in Iran war. The meeting threatens to strain the decades-old US-Japan alliance as Tokyo weighs demands for military assistance.

European NATO members have refused Trump's appeals for coalition to reopen Strait of Hormuz, citing political and strategic concerns. Trump condemned allies for benefiting from US protection without reciprocating support.
Central bank hiked interest rates citing sharply higher fuel prices driven by US-Israel war on Iran. Economic impacts from blocked Hormuz shipping affecting domestic monetary policy decisions.

financial.notes: Global fuel prices soaring due to Strait of Hormuz blockade affecting tanker traffic and energy supplies worldwide.

update_log.text: Iran declares Gulf oil facilities legitimate targets after Israeli attacks on South Pars gasfield
Projectile reported to have struck grounds of Iran's Bushehr nuclear power plant complex
Two killed in central Israel as Iran launches cluster munition barrage on Tel Aviv area
Israeli strikes set fire to Iranian South Pars gas processing facilities affecting daily output
